transcript: Speaker A: Basic VS Native English. How are you? What's up? Of course. Sure thing. You decide. It's up to you. I don't care. Whatever. Speaker B: अगर तुम्हें भी ऐसी इंग्लिश सीखनी है, तो रोज़ मेरे साथ बस 15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो। और फिर कुछ ही दिनों में तुम्हारी इंग्लिश भी बहुत अच्छी हो जाएगी। और यहाँ तुम्हें कोई महीने का ₹2000 भी नहीं देना पड़ेगा। तुम बस ₹1 में शुरू कर सकते हो। फिर पसंद आया, तभी कंटिन्यू करो। तो अभी इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो और अपनी इंग्लिश लर्निंग जर्नी शुरू करो। [If you also want to learn English like this, then practice with me for just 15 minutes daily. And then in just a few days, your English will also become very good. And here you won't even have to pay ₹2000 per month. You can start for just ₹1. Then if you like it, only then continue. So click on the install button now, install the MySivi app, and start your English learning journey.] Speaker C: Download MySivi English speaking app. Install Now.
on_screen_text: Basic VS Native. How are you? - What's up? Of course - Sure thing. You decide - It's up to you. I don't care - Whatever. Hurry up! - Chop-chop. Don't give up - Hang in there. I agree - Same here. I'm tired - I'm beat. Not cool - Lame. Go to bed - Hit the sack. AGAR TUMHE BHI AESI ENGLISH SEEKHNI HAI, TOH ROZ MERE SAATH BAS 15 MINUTES PRACTICE KARO [If you also want to learn English like this, practice with me for just 15 minutes daily]. MySivi Premium: 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1. MySivi English speaking app, Install Now.
summary: The ad contrasts basic English phrases with native alternatives written on paper. An AI avatar introduces the MySivi app, offering a 3-day premium trial for just ₹1. It encourages users to practice 15 minutes daily to achieve fluency.
